core.name: types.ts
core.description: All TypeScript types, interfaces, and getDefaultValues().

core.name: FormFieldErrorBoundary.tsx
core.description: Per-field error boundary wrapper used by all form stacks.

core.name: hydration.ts
core.description: Optional hydration utilities — applyHydration() for backend data.

hook.name: useBackendErrors.ts
hook.description: Backend error types + mapBackendErrors (stack-neutral; RHF applyBackendErrors lives in react-hook-form/).

hook.name: useInfiniteOptions.ts
hook.description: Async and infinite-scroll option loading hooks.

util.name: zodSchemaBuilder.ts
util.description: Runtime schema builder and compile-time code generator.

util.name: fieldExtraKeys.ts
util.description: Utility to persist extra response-mapped values under "{fieldName}__{key}".

util.name: watchPopulate.ts
util.description: Watch & auto-populate coercion, valueMap resolution, and reset helpers for all field types.

util.name: dependentApiRequest.ts
util.description: Dependent API URL/header/payload substitution and axios config for async/infinite fetches.

util.name: dateSerialize.tsx
util.description: HeaderlessMonth override for react-day-picker — drops the built-in month/year + nav caption row when surrounding UI provides its own.

util.name: dateFieldHelpers.ts
util.description: Shared pure helpers for DateField across all stacks (months/hours/minutes constants, to24Hour, generateYears, buildDateDisabler, stampPickedDay, getDateFieldFormatString).

util.name: fileFieldHelpers.ts
util.description: Shared pure helpers for FileField across all stacks (formatFileSize, matchesAcceptedType).

util.name: formFieldGuards.ts
util.description: Shared type guards used by every form-field router (hasOptions, hasDependentApiConfig, hasWatchValue).
